text.title: On-Call Handoff Protocol Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree gating whether oncall-handoff-protocol applies. Root question is a yes/no observable on the incoming task; branches name a concrete observable (`when`) and conclude either with a rule reference from 01-core-rules.xml or with a skip directive.

decision-tree.root-question: Did the shift have ≥1 paging incident OR open follow-ups?

branch.conclusion: Run full handoff including incident status.
Escalate to ops lead; consider extending overlap.

example.description: When `yes AND open_incidents>0` holds, the tree concludes `rule:r1` — meaning the methodology applies via that specific rule. The agent should load the referenced rule from 01-core-rules.xml and follow it.
